name: orthoinit
why: Orthogonal init on Q,K,V,MLP.fc matrices (gain=1.0) provides better initial geometry than Kaiming uniform. Used by top submissions #135, #162, #164. Should improve early convergence.
validates: Faster early convergence (steps 50-100) and better final val_bpb.
falsifies: Early convergence advantage disappears by step 300; Kaiming is good enough.
notes: Only affects matrices with min(shape) >= 64. Zero-init projections are unchanged.
Watch: early learning curve shape, not just final value.
